prompt: A cinematic studio portrait of two men facing each other in a tense stare-down against a plain dark grey background. On the left, {argument name="left actor" default="Jensen Ackles"} wearing {argument name="left costume" default="a dark blue textured superhero suit with red gloves, gold eagle pauldrons, and a cape"}. On the right, {argument name="right actor" default="Antony Starr"} wearing {argument name="right costume" default="a dark green and black tactical suit with a star emblem on the chest and red gloves"}. The man on the right has his hands on his hips. Dramatic, moody studio lighting, highly detailed, photorealistic.

breakdown.creativeCore: Superhero Costume Swap Portrait：Generates a cinematic studio portrait of two actors wearing swapped superhero costumes facing each other.
breakdown.subject: 人物
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 人物头像、社媒头像、角色主视觉、个人品牌照

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 人物/角色 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[景别/角度/版式层级/主体位置]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, photorealistic, cinematic, studio]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: studio lighting]。

Text requirements:
包含文字或排版元素。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
